question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main sections of the thesis. Instead, it presents a timeline of activities related to the thesis development, not the content structure of the thesis itself.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the contents of each section of the thesis. It outlines a schedule of tasks rather than explaining what each section of the thesis will contain.

question: Structure
feedback: It is not easy to understand the general structure of the thesis from this text, as it focuses on the timeline of the work rather than the organization of the thesis content.
